# Medi Spero - Premium Hemp Wellness

## Quick Summary
Medi Spero sells pharmaceutical-grade CBD and legal hemp-derived THC products (Delta-8, Delta-9) for mental wellness including anxiety relief, mood support, ADHD/focus, and depression management.

## Key Facts
- Website: medispero.com
- Contact: info@medispero.com | +1 (334) 746-9312
- Products: CBD oils, gummies, capsules, THC products, topicals
- Price Range: $150-$950 (premium pharmaceutical positioning)
- Free Shipping: Orders $250+
- All products are Farm Bill compliant (<0.3% Delta-9 THC)

## Product Categories
1. CBD Oils & Tinctures
2. CBD Gummies  
3. Anti-Anxiety Products
4. Mood & Depression Support
5. ADHD & Focus Support
6. Pharmaceutical Capsules
7. THC Products (Delta-8, Delta-9)
8. CBD Topicals

## Verification
- Lab results: medispero.com/lab-results
- Third-party tested, COAs available
- GMP-certified US manufacturing
